chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD IInd Appeal No.67 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.09.2024 Mr. Wafa Nawaz Ali Shar advocate for applicant. Counsel for the applicant under the instructions does not press instant IInd Appeal, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE Ali Haider
